subcodes.title: Li-Jinabi Aqa Muhammad Hasan
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! There is no God but Thee. I testify, and all things bear witness, that Thou art God, there is no God but Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحانک اللهم ان لا اله الا انت لاشهدنک ثم کل شیء علی انک انت الله لا اله الا انت
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @divine attributes are within all things; every atom, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
